statement: In every magma, Equation 2976 (`x = ((y * (z * x)) * x) * w`) implies Equation 4646 (`(x * y) * x = (z * y) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0913
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y (op z x)) x) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op (op x y) x) = (op (op z y) y)
